title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Policy Impact Survey (FR 3075; OMB No. 7100-0362).
action: On October 2, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 80242) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3075. The comment period for this notice expired on December 2, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2025-02361
title_normalized: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
bm25_text: 2025-02361 Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB On October 2, 2024, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (89 FR 80242) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3075. The comment period for this notice expired on December 2, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments. The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Policy Impact Survey (FR 3075; OMB No. 7100-0362).
